parameters.description: Start date of the query (required)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description:
End date of the query (optional).
If not provided, defaults to startDate + 7 days.
Always limited to a maximum of 7 days from the startDate.

parameters.description: Total number of records to return.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Total number of records to skip.

parameters.name: deletePermissions
parameters.description:
Boolean (true or false). Defaults to false.  
When set to true, deletes any existing permissions assigned to the specified collaborator.

parameters.name: overwritePermissions
parameters.description:
Boolean (true or false). Defaults to false.  
When set to true, replaces all existing permissions with those provided in the permission array.  
When false, the new permissions are added incrementally to the existing ones.

parameters.name: updatePermissionsOnly
parameters.description:
Boolean (true or false). Defaults to false.  
When set to true, only the employee's permissions are updated, without changing any other employee information.

parameters.description: Filter by IdBranch

get.summary: Retrieves active members from a specific branch or from all branches

parameters.name: idBranch
parameters.description:
Branch ID. 
If is not null, returns active members from the specified branch only.
If is null and the token is associated with branch 0 or less (indicating multi-branch access), 
returns active members from all branches of the company.

get.summary: Validates parking access authorization by CPF (`document`) or by `idMember` for a specific branch.

parameters.name: idBranch
parameters.description: Branch identifier for the query. If not provided, the current branch from the context is used.

parameters.description: CPF of the customer/employee to validate. Provide numbers only.

parameters.name: idMember
parameters.description: Identifier of the member (customer or employee) to validate.

parameters.name: personType
parameters.description: Person type related to idMember: 1 for Customer, 2 for Employee. Required when idMember is provided.

get.summary: Gets a list of debts and current status (Similar to the Collections - Default report)

parameters.description: Filter by payment of the account ending in a date (yyyy-mm-dd)

parameters.name: membersIds
parameters.description: Filter by a list of members Id. Values ​​must be separated by commas

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Total number of records to return. (Maximum of 50)

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Total number of records to skip.

parameters.name: idBranch
parameters.description: Filter by IdBranch (Only available when using a multilocation key and membersIds is not null or empty, ignored otherwise.)

parameters.name: memberStatus
parameters.description:
Optional. Filter by member status. Possible values: 
1 = Active, 
2 = Inactive.
You may provide multiple values separated by commas (1,2).

parameters.name: debtStatus
parameters.description:
Optional. Filter by debt status. Possible values: 
1 = Opened, 
2 = Recovered, 
3 = Canceled. 
You may provide multiple values separated by commas (1,2).

parameters.name: chargeDateEnd
parameters.description: Filter by charge of the account ending in a date (yyyy-mm-dd)

parameters.description: Filter by codErp conciliator

parameters.name: idsBranch
parameters.description: Filter by a comma separated list of branch id

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status conciliation: -1 - All, 0 - Awaiting Reconciliation, 1 - Reconciled, 2 - Manually Reconciled, 3 - Justified, 4 - Not Applicable, 5 - Evo Reconciled

parameters.name: authorization
parameters.description: Filter by authorization code of the transaction

parameters.name: idMemberPayer

parameters.description: Filter by sale date ending in a date (yyyy-mm-dd)

parameters.description: Filter by NSU (Unique Sequential Number) of the transaction

parameters.name: tid
parameters.description: Filter by TID (Transaction Identifier) of the transaction

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Filter by the transaction amount

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Total number of records to return. (Maximum of 50)

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Total number of records to skip.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Field name to order the results

parameters.name: orderDirection
parameters.description: Order direction (asc or desc)

parameters.name: idBranch
parameters.description: Filter by a branch Id.

parameters.name: idMember

parameters.name: removalDateEnd
parameters.description: Filter by removal of the sales ending  in a date  (yyyy-mm-dd)

parameters.description: Filter sales that had receivables ending in a date (yyyy-mm-dd)

parameters.name: updatedReceivableEndDate
parameters.description: Filter sales that had receivables changes ending in a date (yyyy-mm-dd)

parameters.name: showReceivables
parameters.description: Flag to show sale receivables and sale value without credit value

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Total number of records to return. (Maximum of 100, default of 25)

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Total number of records to skip.

parameters.name: onlyMembership
parameters.description: Return only sales with membership.

parameters.name: atLeastMonthly
parameters.description: remove membership less than 30 days (as old removeMonthly)

parameters.name: flSwimming
parameters.description: Filters memberships by the swimming flag

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Filter by a session Id.

parameters.description: Filter by registration of the sale in a date (yyyy-mm-dd)

parameters.description: Include activities in the return.

post.description: Endpoint to create a new voucher. The voucher will be created for the specified branch or, if not informed, for the current branch of the authenticated user.

parameters.name: idBranch
parameters.description: Branch Id for which the voucher will be created (optional, used only for multilocation keys).

requestBody.description: Object containing the data of the new voucher to be created.

400.description: Invalid request. Check the data sent.

401.description: Unauthorized. The user does not have permission to create vouchers.

delete.summary: Remove a specific webhook by id

parameters.name: IdWebhook
parameters.description: Webhook id

parameters.name: idEmployee
parameters.description: The ID of the employee associated with the workouts.

parameters.name: idTag
parameters.description: The optional ID of the tag associated with the workouts.

parameters.name: sourceWorkoutId
parameters.description: The ID of the source workout.

parameters.name: idPrescriptionEmployee
parameters.description: The ID of the employee responsible for the prescription.

parameters.name: idClient
parameters.description: The ID of the client to link the workout to.

parameters.name: idProspect
parameters.description: The ID of the prospect to link the workout to.

parameters.name: idEmployee
parameters.description: The ID of the employee to link the workout to.

parameters.name: prescriptionDate
parameters.description: Represent a date associated with a prescription yyyy-MM-dd.

parameters.name: endAllActiveWorkouts
parameters.description: Indicates whether all active workouts for the given client, prospect, or employee should be closed (their expiration date set to yesterday). Default is false.

put.summary: Change data from a client's prescribed workout

parameters.name: idWorkout
parameters.description: The workout's id to be changed.

parameters.name: workoutName
parameters.description: Add a name if you want to change the current name. To keep the current name, the field must be empty.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The workout's start date.

parameters.name: expirationDate
parameters.description: The workout's expiration date.

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: You can add more than one category by separating them with commas. When adding categories, any categories already added to the workout will be replaced by the categories you add.

parameters.name: restrictions
parameters.description: You can add more than one restriction by separating them with commas. When adding restriction, any restriction already added to the workout will be replaced by the restriction you add.

parameters.name: idProfessor
parameters.description: The ID of the professor who create the workouts.

parameters.name: totalWeeks
parameters.description: Total number of weeks the client will do the workout.

parameters.name: weeklyFrequency
parameters.description: The client's weekly frequency.

get.summary: Get all client's or prospect's or employee's workouts by month, year or idProfessor

parameters.name: idProfessor
parameters.description: The ID of the professor who create the workouts.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month to get the workouts.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year to get the workouts.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Total number of records to skip.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Total number of records to return. (Maximum of 50)
